format: ALEX/JORDAN dialog, plain text, no markdown, no stage directions
notes: Episode 3 'Political Record'. Walks 4 prior runs (2014 4th/15.7%, 2018 2nd/17.6%, 2022 won vs Saah, 2026 slate filing 2/3/2026). Deep treatment of HB 147 spousal-defense repeal saga — 2021 House 125-4 then died after Senate dilution amendments, 2022 House 125-6 / Senate 46-0 enacted. Other bills: women's pre-release mediation 2019, first-degree murder review for minors 2021, hate-crime civil action 2022, marijuana expungement co-sponsorships, Justice Reinvestment Oversight Board membership 2022-. Endorsements: MCEA, MWC AFL-CIO. Clean controversy record. Listener-flagged questions: NOT a fiscal-restriction candidate; NO public statement on Wootton (Board of Ed matter, not GA); caucus alignment makes her likely supporter of MD's existing sanctuary framework. Avoid-list respected.
